/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -W -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wno-unused-parameter -Wcast-align -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/example.dir/example.c.o -o example  ../../src/libfluidsynth.a -Wl,-framework,CoreAudio,-framework,AudioUnit -lm
